title: To the stars!
description: Blast off into the unknown with the power of Galacticraft and make powerful factories with the power of IndustrialCraft 2!
body:
Take your adventures beyond the limits of Earth! To the Stars! combines the industrial might of IndustrialCraft2 with the cosmic exploration of Galacticraft, giving you the ultimate experience in technological progression and interstellar travel.

- Build massive factories with IndustrialCraft2, automate resource production, and power your machines with cutting-edge technology.

- Explore new planets and moons with Galacticraft where you can create rockets, survive alien environments, and uncover the mysteries of space.

- Combine tech and space: power your rockets with nuclear energy, automate asteroid mining, and bring your industrial empire to the stars.

- Challenge yourself: manage resources, survive harsh planetary conditions, and master complex tech trees as you expand humanity’s reach.

Whether you’re a tech mastermind or a fearless space explorer, To the Stars! is your launchpad to adventure, discovery, and intergalactic domination!
